children.heading: Failure to register or reregister
children.label: a Failure to register or reregister
children.text: Every person who is required to register or reregister under section 4101 and fails to do so shall pay a penalty in addition to the tax (if any).
$10,000 for each initial failure to register or reregister, and
$1,000 for each day thereafter such person fails to register or reregister.

children.heading: Reasonable cause exception
children.label: c Reasonable cause exception
children.text: No penalty shall be imposed under this section with respect to any failure if it is shown that such failure is due to reasonable cause.
